evidence.q1: 1. Roles and Scope, 2. Definitions, 3. Documented Instructions ... 15. Term and Transition Assistance
evidence.q2: For personal data processed under this DPA,
evidence.q4: Vendor will maintain administrative, technical, and physical safeguards for hosted Personal Data,
evidence.q5: Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report, responses to security and privacy questionnaires within 10 business days, and written control mappings needed to demonstrate compliance with this DPA.
evidence.q6: Vendor will process Personal Data only on documented instructions from Customer (Section 3) and Claims arising from Vendor's breach of this DPA are subject to the liability cap and exclusions stated in the master services agreement (Section 14).
